# Type

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit field.

## Overview

Contains the four-character code `'wave'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the decompression parameters atom.
- **Extension atoms**: Atoms containing the necessary out-of-band decompression parameters for the sound decompressor.
